team.heading: Experts You Trust

whyChooseUs.heading: About Lume Dental Clinic
intro: At Lume Dental, we believe that a healthy smile is a gateway to confidence and well-being.
Our team of experienced dentists and hygienists use the latest technology to provide top-quality dental care in a comfortable and welcoming environment.
whyChooseUs.sideText: Whether you need routine cleanings, cosmetic enhancements, or advanced procedures, we are here to help you achieve the smile of your dreams.

items.title: State-of-the-art equipment
items.text: We use the latest advancements in dental technology to provide precise, effective care.

items.title: Experienced & caring professionals
items.text: Our team of dentists, hygienists, and specialists brings years of expertise and a passion for patient care.

items.title: Pain-free, stress-free treatments
items.text: We understand that dental visits can be stressful, which is why we prioritize comfort.

items.title: Personalized approach for every patient
items.text: Every smile is unique, and so is every treatment plan.

testimonials.heading: Smiles That Speak for Themselves

faq.heading: Get clear answers to your questions

items.q: How often should I visit the dentist?
items.a: We recommend a check-up and professional cleaning every 6 months, though your dentist may suggest more frequent visits based on your oral health.
